public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quiet operative.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a quiet operative still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quiet operative in and around Containment Research Concord, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Containment Research Concord workable through the obligations of quiet operative while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Containment Research Concord, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of quiet operative visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Kelm Frostglass can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Kelm Frostglass can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Kelm Frostglass carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Containment Research Concord: the part of Containment Research Concord where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
